SMALL CLAIMS ORDER OF EXAMINATION CALENDAR
Off Calendar May-02-2011 Discharged

SMALL CLAIMS - CLAIM - TRIAL COURT CALENDAR
Off Calendar Feb-15-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF/RESPONDENT PANFILO ARMAS AND DEFENDANTS/APPELLANTS MARK AND LAURIE ROMERO ARE PRESENT IN COURT.

THIS CAUSE COMES ON REGULARLY FOR TRIAL DE NOVO. ALL PARTIES AND WITNESSES ARE SWORN.

PLAINTIFF/RESPONDENT PANFILO ARMAS TESTIFIES. THE FOLLOWING DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCE IS INTRODUCED:

1)LETTER DATED 9/3/10 ON "AMERICAN ROOFING COMPANY" LETTERHEAD WITH ATTACHED PHOTO AND INVOICE.

DEFENDANTS/APPELLANTS MARK AND LAURIE ROMERO TESTIFY. THE FOLLOWING DOCUMETARY EVIDENCE IS INTRODUCED:

A)FRANCISCO GALICIA'S STATEMENT DATED 12/6/10
B)EMAIL DATED 9/21/10 WITH ATTACHED LETTER DATED 9/3/10 ON "AMERICAN ROOFING COMPANY" LETTERHEAD
C)STATEMENT OF LAURIE AND MARK ROMERO
D)SUBARGREEMENT (AMERICAN ROOFING INC) WITH ATTACHED EMAILS
E)PROPOSED DECISION AND ORDER, CASE # N2009-273
F)PHOTOS

AT THE CONCLUSION OF THE HEARING, THE MATTER IS TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION.

JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II, NOT REPORTED, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA (502).
